calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-071 GoalState Persistence Fix (085c bug)
items.note: Fix for EXQ-085c: removed goal_state.reset() per-episode bug. GoalState persists across episodes. 500 warmup + 100 eval x 2 seeds x 2 conditions = 240 min Mac.

items.title: MECH-095 TPJ CE Routing Fix (047i bug)
items.note: Fix for EXQ-047i: CE routing head replaces near-zero MSE loss; balanced contact probe replaces majority-class collapse. 400 warmup + 20 probe x 2 seeds x 2 conditions = 168 min Mac.

items.title: ARC-016 Rollout E3 Training Fix (088 bug)
items.note: Fix for EXQ-088: explicit E3 training step during warmup using harm_bridge(z_world).detach() as input (matches eval distribution). 200 warmup + 5x80 eval eps x 150 steps = 45 min Mac / 225 min Daniel-PC.
